query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl LIKE '%unsplash%' THEN 1 END) as unsplash,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl LIKE '%pexels%' THEN 1 END) as pexels,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl LIKE '%cloudfront%' OR imageUrl LIKE '%forge%' OR imageUrl LIKE '%storage%' THEN 1 END) as ai_or_s3,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 END) as no_image,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM recipes WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3N8WHcqSjo6gJV1.8cb8a16f7acb --database ndjzMo7PxeapbzLjBHjsKj --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl LIKE '%unsplash%' THEN 1 END) as unsplash,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl LIKE '%pexels%' THEN 1 END) as pexels,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl LIKE '%cloudfront%' OR imageUrl LIKE '%forge%' OR imageUrl LIKE '%storage%' THEN 1 END) as ai_or_s3,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN imageUrl IS NULL OR imageUrl = '' THEN 1 END) as no_image,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM recipes WHERE deletedAt IS NULL;
